index.title: ESRF.net — European Security & Resilience Community
index.description: ESRF.net is a decentralised community of 1,892 organisations across 29 European countries working to strengthen security and resilience through ten vital sectors and five moral principles.
index.hero_deck: Where governments set policy and international bodies coordinate, ESRF.net unites the businesses, institutions and citizens whose daily work quietly sustains our shared life — a decentralised framework powered by the organisations that drive the economy.
index.hero_caption: A community of practitioners, spanning twenty-nine nations, bound by five moral principles.
index.foundation_sub: For local impact. For shared resilience. For a Europe that holds.
index.foundation_body_1: The European Security & Resilience Framework is the foundation of ESRF.net — a decentralised network built for, and by, the entrepreneurs with local impact. We believe security is not merely a government mandate. It is an entrepreneurial responsibility, and a civic one.
index.foundation_pull: Security is not just a mandate. It is a responsibility we carry, together.
index.foundation_body_2: By building resilience from the ground up, we connect organisations across twenty-nine countries into self-sustaining ecosystems with regional impact. The foundation channels donations, contributions and aligned capital into initiatives that strengthen the network and expand its reach across the continent.
index.foundation_body_3: Organisations are classified across ten vital sectors aligned with the EU NIS2 Directive and guided by five moral principles: vigilance, stewardship, empowerment, solidarity and renewal.
index.pillars_title: Five ways to hold the line.
index.sectors_lede: Every organisation in the ESRF.net community is classified across ten vital sectors — the domains where resilience is either built or lost. Counts below reflect the current directory.
index.atlas_lede: Every pin is an organisation; every cluster, a city; every colour, a sector. The atlas is a living record of who sustains the daily machinery of a resilient Europe.
index.analytics_lede: Three figures, published each issue — where the community is concentrated, where it is sparse, and how the five moral pillars distribute across vital sectors.
index.dispatch_lede: A curated feed of European security, resilience and crisis signals — filed under the pillar each story touches. The full dispatch is updated continuously.
index.join_title: Does your organisation contribute to a Europe that holds?
index.join_sub: Request a listing and take your place on the atlas. Membership of the ESRF.net community is free for organisations whose work strengthens European security and resilience.

directory.title: Directory — ESRF.net
directory.description: Browse 1,892 organisations across 29 European countries that form the ESRF.net community — filter by sector, country and moral pillar.
directory.hero_deck: One thousand eight hundred and ninety-two organisations — sorted by sector, country and moral pillar. Search, filter, and read who holds each part of Europe together.
directory.join_sub: Any organisation whose work contributes to European security and resilience is welcome in the ESRF.net community.

map.heading: Community Atlas
map.instructions: Click any marker for organisation detail. Filter by pillar or search by name.

analytics.description: Data analytics for the ESRF.net community — sector distribution, country breakdown and moral pillar analysis across 1,892 organisations.
analytics.hero_deck: Three figures from the current atlas — where the community is concentrated, where it is sparse, and how the five moral pillars distribute across vital sectors.

news.title: Dispatch — ESRF.net
news.description: The ESRF.net dispatch — curated European security and resilience signals, filed under the moral pillar each story touches.
news.hero_deck: A curated ledger of European security, resilience and crisis signals — each filed under the pillar whose concerns it touches. Updated continuously.

about.title: Foundation — ESRF.net
about.description: About ESRF.net — the European Security & Resilience Framework, its charter, its five moral pillars and how organisations join the community.
about.hero_deck: The European Security & Resilience Framework — the foundation of ESRF.net — is built on a simple conviction: resilience is not the exclusive work of states. It is the everyday labour of the organisations, institutions and citizens whose local impact sustains the whole.
about.charter_quote: Security is not just a mandate. It is a responsibility we carry, together.

privacy.title: Privacy — ESRF.net
privacy.description: Privacy policy for ESRF.net — how we collect, use and protect your data.

countries.title: Countries — ESRF.net
countries.description: Browse ESRF.net organisations by country — 29 European nations in the community.
countries.hero_deck: Every country in the ESRF.net community — from the Atlantic to the Baltic, the Arctic to the Mediterranean.

footer.brand_desc: European Security & Resilience Foundation — a decentralised community of 1,892 organisations across 29 countries.

pillar.prevent_body: To notice before it is loud — structural attention to signals and systemic risks.
pillar.protect_body: To guard what sustains us — critical functions, vital processes, shared interests.
pillar.prepare_body: To stand ready, together — through training, innovation and sustainable preparedness.
pillar.respond_body: To act as one when it matters — reliable networks, rapid coordination, mutual support.
pillar.recover_body: To rise stronger than before — absorb shocks, accelerate recovery, renew the system.
